description: You are a Database Reliability Engineer investigating potential disk thrashing on ec2_instance_1. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Storage Thrashing Analysis' to correlate CPU cost to storage throughput. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'Compute vs Storage Throughput' containing targets for servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization and servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes (scaled by 0.000001 and aliased as 'Disk Write (MB)'). Include a second graph titled 'Thrashing Index' that calculates CPU cost per MB written using the formula divideSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, scale(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes, 0.000001)) aliased as 'CPU per MB Written'. Include a third graph titled 'Smoothed Thrashing Trend' that applies a moving median filter with a window size of 12 to the Thrashing Index formula, aliased as 'Smoothed Trend'. Save the dashboard when complete.
